content:
@everyone

Star Atlas will be at Breakpoint from November 4-7!

There will be a few interesting Star Atlas surprises + Our CEO, Michael Wagner, will have a keynote.

Schedule and more details will be shared soon. 

Learn more about the event: http://solana.com/breakpoint/agenda
